chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6183 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For hearing on Misc No.26194/2021 (Stay). 2. For hearing of Main Case. 22.10.2021 Mr. Madan Lal, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. Mr. Imran Ali Mithani, Advocate undertakes to file vakalatnama on behalf of respondent department. Learned counsel seeks provisional release of the consignment subject to payment of duties/fine penalty, if any, in the order dated 11.10.2021 passed under Section 25D of the Customs Act, 1969, since this order has been assailed by the petitioner before the appellate forum. Let the goods be released accordingly after securing the differential amount which may include imposition of fine, if any, with the Nazir of this Court by way of pay order(s)/ bank guarantee, in respect of the consignment(s) covered by this petition. Once the amount is secured as stipulated supra, the Nazir shall issue the appropriate certificate(s). If the amount is secured by way of pay order(s), the Nazir shall invest the amount in profit bearing instruments, as per the Rules. On presentation of certificate(s) issued by the Nazir, the concerned Collectorate/Department shall release the consignment(s) forthwith. The fate of the amount secured supra shall be subject to the outcome of the appeal pending before the appellate forum. This petition, alongwith pending application(s), is disposed of in terms herein. JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
